title: How to install / delete tracks manually

messages.content: # Wondering how to install and/or delete tracks manually directly in the game folder, follow this guide!

# How to install a track manually
## Step 1
> Download and install 7zip
> [**7zip**](<https://www.7-zip.org/>) is free.

## Step 2
> Download the map from our [**Content Delivery Network**](https://cdn.nohesi.gg/)

## Step 3
> Go to your root folder for Assetto Corsa > Open the Content folder > Open the Track folder

## Step 4
> Ensure the track is not a zip file and that it is not contained within a subfolder like “Content” or “Assetto Corsa”.

## Step 5
> Drag the folder into the track folder by either putting it into the empty space on the right or in the file directory at the top.

** **
# How to uninstall a track
## Step 1
> Go to your root folder for Assetto Corsa

## Step 2
> Open the Content folder > Open the Track folder > Find the specific track you want to delete

## Step 3
> Right click on the track then hit delete

# VIDEO GUIDE
